name: Orange Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, flour, and salt in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add orange juice, water, and egg, mixing thoroughly.
3. Place over boiling water and cook for 10 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Add grated orange rind and butter.
5. Cool. Makes enough filling to spread between two 9-inch layers (generously), or between three 10-inch layers.
